```shell
  @ utils.retry_until_true(timeout = 2.minutes, maxWaitPeriod = 1.minutes) {
        val flagStatus = target.parties
          .clear_party_onboarding_flag(alice, synchronizerId, targetLedgerEnd)
        flagStatus match {
         case FlagSet(_) => false
         case FlagNotSet => true
        }
      }
```
